[DQC.US.0001.75] The member TreasuryStockValue is inappropriately used on the axis StatementEquityComponentsAxis. The only members allowed on this axis are extension members defined by the filer and the elements defined as children of this axis in the US GAAP taxonomy. There are no facts associated with this member and axis.
